eval_dimensions.name: Subcommand Routing
eval_dimensions.description: Correctly parses arguments to determine subcommand (list, view, edit, reset) and routes to the appropriate workflow

eval_dimensions.name: Plan Resolution
eval_dimensions.description: Resolves plans using the correct order: user overrides (persist: false first, then persist: true), then defaults from user file, then schema defaults

eval_dimensions.name: Guided Editing Flow
eval_dimensions.description: Uses AskUserQuestion decision gates for all edit operations (add/remove/reorder/edit step), previews changes before saving, and supports continue-editing loop

eval_dimensions.name: Plan File Management
eval_dimensions.description: Creates plan file only on first save, preserves existing overrides when adding new ones, correctly formats YAML with persist flag and date

eval_dimensions.name: Decision Gates
eval_dimensions.description: All blocking choices use AskUserQuestion tool calls, not plain text questions

evals.name: List plans with no arguments
evals.description: User invokes /dev10x:work-plan with no arguments, expects summary table of all work types

evals.name: View a specific plan type
evals.description: User invokes /dev10x:work-plan view feature, expects full plan tree

assertions.signal: Shows the first step of the feature plan
Reads the schema file to get plan defaults

evals.name: Edit subcommand uses AskUserQuestion
evals.description: Edit flow must use AskUserQuestion for operation selection

assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion is called for edit operation selection
AskUserQuestion is called for save/continue/discard decision

evals.name: Reset subcommand confirms before deleting
evals.description: Reset must confirm with user before removing overrides

assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion is called before resetting overrides
